selectors.empty_marker: we do not have any open vacancies

notes: Server-rendered WP page (earlier JS-rendered diagnosis was wrong). Vacancy markup job--list__item/_title/_link taken from the 2026-02 Wayback snapshot (M&A Analyst/Associate Munich + London then). empty_marker = the site's explicit no-vacancies prose.
